description: Known H-1B visa sponsors among tracked companies. US-located roles from these companies are eligible for consideration if they score 75%+ fit.
note: US roles below 75% are skipped. US roles from non-sponsor companies are skipped regardless of score.

known_non_sponsors.description: Companies that typically do NOT sponsor H-1B for junior/mid roles or have explicit no-sponsorship policies

rules.us_role_from_sponsor: Consider if fit >= 75%. Flag as 'us_sponsorship_required' in intake.
rules.us_role_from_non_sponsor: Skip. Log reason: 'US role, company not a known H-1B sponsor.'
rules.us_role_from_unknown: Skip. Log reason: 'US role, sponsorship status unknown.'
rules.uk_role: Process normally through existing location filter.
rules.defense_or_clearance_role: Skip regardless of other factors. Requires US citizenship or clearance.
